metadata.engine: V5.1 Adaptive Exposure Policy Simulation Foundation
metadata.purpose: Map fixed qualitative policy modes to qualitative exposure levels and audit historical contradictions.

current.explanation: Policy mode late_cycle_control maps to qualitative exposure level LOW under phase LATE_CYCLE and risk state CROWDED; this is simulation-only.

summary.key_read: Mapped 140 policy rows to qualitative exposure levels. Dominant level is BALANCED (119/140); contradiction_rate=0.141791.
